user_query:
I need you to index and synthesize our workspace notes, then answer some questions from them.

Please do all of the following, using ONLY the files under input/ as your sources, and write ALL artifacts to output/:

1) Fact extraction with contradiction handling
- Read: input/notes/project_alpha.md, input/notes/bug_report.md, input/notes/contacts.md
- Extract concise, atomic facts with categories from: knowledge, error, timeline, preference, tool, client, hr
- Deduplicate and detect contradictions. When two facts conflict (e.g., different deadlines for the same project), keep the most recent truth and record the contradiction with both values and sources in a log.
- Save facts to output/facts.json as a JSON array of objects with at least: {"content": string, "category": string, "source": string, "evidence": string, "timestamp": string}
- Save contradictions to output/contradiction_log.json with: {"contradictions": [{"entity": string, "field": string, "values": [{"value": string, "source": string}], "resolution": string}]}

2) Knowledge graph build (entities + relationships)
- Build a lightweight entity graph from the notes capturing projects, people, organizations/clients, and their relationships (e.g., leads, role_of, contact_for, uses_stack, has_deadline)
- Save to output/knowledge_graph.json with: {"entities": [{"id": string, "type": "project"|"person"|"org"|"tech"|"policy"|"metric", "name": string}], "relationships": [{"source": string, "type": string, "target": string, "evidence": string}]}
- Ensure node names are human-readable and relationship types are verbs/snake_case

3) Unified recall answers with citations
- Read: input/queries.txt (one question per line)
- For each question, synthesize an answer using the extracted facts and graph, and include source citations (file paths under input/ and line numbers if you can)
- Write to output/recall_results.md in this exact repeated block format per question:
  Q: <exact question>
  A: <succinct answer>
  Sources: <comma-separated list of input/<...> file references>

Outputs to create:
- output/facts.json
- output/contradiction_log.json
- output/knowledge_graph.json
- output/recall_results.md

Notes to keep in mind:
- In input/notes/project_alpha.md there is an older deadline and a later update; resolve in favor of the later update but log the contradiction.
- Be precise and avoid generic filler language; prefer verifiable, source-backed statements.
